title: Racing A Toyota Tamaraw, And Why Toyota Is A Cultural Brand In The Philippines (Culture Trip Ep. 1)
ronaldo noob
description: A 12-minute documentary short following a third-generation smokehouse. Built from 14 hours of vérité footage — the edit leans on long takes and ambient sound beds to let the place breathe.

title: Afterglow
description: Music video cut around a single continuous dolly move, intercut with 8mm scans. Speed-ramped transitions hide the seams; grain and gate-weave matched in After Effects.

title: Form & Function
description: Product launch film for a furniture studio. Macro textures cut against full-room reveals — sound design carries the transitions: every material has its own foley signature.

title: North of Nowhere
description: Travel film shot across the Lofoten Islands. Edited and graded entirely in Resolve — a cold, desaturated palette that cracks open into warmth for the final act.

title: Thread Count
description: Fashion editorial cut to feel like a flip-book: hard cuts on pose changes, typography slammed between frames, zero dissolves. 45 seconds, 90 cuts.

title: The Long Table
description: Event recap for a 200-guest open-air dinner. A golden-hour piece assembled overnight for next-morning delivery — proof that fast and considered aren't opposites.

title: Static Bloom
description: A 9-minute short about a radio operator who hears tomorrow's broadcast. The edit plays with repetition and off-by-one-frame echoes to keep the audience slightly out of sync.

title: Process — Studio Series
description: Ongoing YouTube series breaking down editing decisions in real projects — timeline anatomy, sound-led cuts, and why some frames need to die.

title: Showreel 2025
description: Sixty seconds of selected work from the last two years, recut to a single track. Watch with sound on.
